title: Senior Frontend Developer at MagicBricks South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at MagicBricks South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at MagicBricks South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Aurangabad-based team.

About MagicBricks South Asia Partners:
MagicBricks South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MagicBricks South Asia Partners!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
